status: LOCKED — do not modify after fabrication begins
note_domain_mismatch: All simulation predictions below were computed on a 2.0 x 2.0 x 2.0 mm domain (8 mm3). The fabricated specimen targets 5.0 x 5.0 x 5.0 mm. R_th and delta_P scale non-linearly with domain size. Acceptance bands (2x on R_th, 3x on delta_P) are intentionally wide to accommodate this mismatch. A corrected simulation at the 5 mm fabrication domain is recommended before declaring a quantitative model-to-bench comparison valid (STAGE7-AUD-001, H-2).
note_pressure_drop: 1000 Pa is the inlet boundary condition applied to the solver, not a predicted output. The Stage 4 solver enforces this as a fixed-head condition.
note_power: Stage 5 heat input is 4.0 W (1 MW/m2 x 4 mm2 heated surface). The benchtop test plan uses 25 W as the nominal heater power. R_th is expected to be power-independent in the single-phase linear regime; this assumption is not verified by simulation (STAGE7-AUD-001, M-1).
note_flow_rate: Stage 4 predicted Q = 44.02 LPM is non-physical. It implies ~183 m/s mean velocity through a 4 mm2 cross-section, caused by Darcy permeability k=1e-6 m2 assigned to fluid voxels. Real bench flow rates will be orders of magnitude lower. Do not use this value for equipment sizing or pass/fail comparison (STAGE7-AUD-001, W-2, H-1).

acceptance_bands.Q_pass_band: NOT DEFINED — Stage 4 Q is non-physical; do not apply pass/fail to measured Q

pipeline_git_sha: PLACEHOLDER — replace with actual git SHA before fabrication begins
note_pipeline_sha: Record the git SHA at the time this simulation reference is locked. All bench comparisons must reference this SHA. See pipeline_git_sha.txt in this directory.
